prompt: Create a full-body high-fashion anime-realistic portrait of a young woman standing gracefully in a dark, star-speckled studio space with a soft white glow rising from the floor. She has glossy black short bobbed hair with a side part and subtle silver highlights, delicate dangling earrings, and an intentionally soft, indistinct blurred face with no readable facial features. She wears an elegant pale lavender vintage lolita-inspired midi dress: sheer puffed bishop sleeves, lace cuffs, ruffled shoulders, a high frilled neckline with a small bow, fitted corset-like waist, vertical front buttons, and a wide translucent organza skirt with a subtle plaid texture and many soft pleats. Her pose is demure and symmetrical, holding the sides of the skirt outward with both hands to show the volume, legs crossed slightly at the ankles. Add matching lavender Mary Jane heels with bow straps. Use cinematic softbox lighting, luminous rim light on the dress edges, glossy reflective floor shadow, delicate fabric translucency, realistic folds, pastel elegance, ultra-detailed clothing design, refined feminine styling, centered composition, vertical portrait framing.
